title: CHILD WELFARE SERVICES - 211info
text: MEDFORD CHILD WELFARE CHILD WELFARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help in keeping families united. Finds temporary and permanent homes for kids who need them, including foster and adoptive homes. The program also teaches people how to become resource parents. 909 Royal Court Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed on major holidys Email (541) 474-3120 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 474-3120 Abuse Reporting Line (855) 503-7233 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:00pm Services: Adoption Services Family Preservation Programs Foster Home Placement Foster Parent/Family Recruitment Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD ABUSE REPORTING MUTUAL SUPPORT - FOSTER, ADOPT, AND KINSHIP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
